itinerary.route: Northland — Cape Reinga to Mangawhai Heads
itinerary.overnight: Ninety Mile Beach camps / Mangawhai DOC campsite
itinerary.mapNote: Section 1/10 · Northland · Cape Reinga lighthouse — tip of Aotearoa. Te Paki sand dunes. 90-mile beach road walk. Waipoua Kauri forest.

itinerary.route: Auckland Region — Mangawhai to Mercer via Auckland
itinerary.mapNote: Section 2/10 · Auckland · Urban traverse of NZ's largest city. Volcanic cones — One Tree Hill, Mount Eden. The TA passes through city streets.

itinerary.route: Waikato & King Country — Mercer to Taumarunui
itinerary.mapNote: Section 3/10 · Waikato · Hauraki Rail Trail. Timber Trail on converted railway. Hauhungaroa Range dense bush. Long section through farmland and forest.

itinerary.route: Whanganui River Journey — Taumarunui to Whanganui city
itinerary.overnight: River camps / John Coull Hut / Pipiriki Lodge
itinerary.mapNote: Section 4/10 · Whanganui River · 5 days by canoe or kayak down the sacred Whanganui. One of NZ's Great Journeys. Bridge to Nowhere side trip.

itinerary.route: Central Plateau — Whanganui to Tongariro Crossing
itinerary.mapNote: Section 5/10 · Tongariro · The Alpine Crossing — most-walked day hike in NZ. Mount Ngauruhoe (Mount Doom). Red Crater 1967m. Emerald Lakes.

itinerary.route: Tararua Ranges — Palmerston North to Wellington
itinerary.overnight: Tararua huts / Wellington city / Interislander ferry
itinerary.mapNote: Section 6/10 · Tararua Ranges · Hardest North Island section. Extreme weather. Mitre 1571m. Wellington ferry crossing to South Island.

itinerary.route: Marlborough & Nelson — Picton to St Arnaud
itinerary.overnight: Queen Charlotte huts / Richmond Range huts
itinerary.mapNote: Section 7/10 · Marlborough · Queen Charlotte Track along the Sounds. Richmond Ranges exposed ridge walking. Mount Richmond 1760m.

itinerary.route: Nelson Lakes & St James — St Arnaud to Boyle Village
itinerary.overnight: St James Walkway huts / Boyle Lodge
itinerary.mapNote: Section 8/10 · Nelson Lakes · Alpine St James high country. Tussock passes. Merino sheep stations. The Canterbury high country character changes the trail.

itinerary.route: Southern Alps — Arthur's Pass to Queenstown
itinerary.mapNote: Section 9/10 · Southern Alps · Avalanche Peak 1833m. Brewster Glacier. Haast Pass. Mount Aspiring NP. Most technical section — river crossings, route-finding essential.
Section 10/10 · Southland · Mavora Lakes tussock. The Southland flats. Bluff — the southern terminus. The famous directional signpost. End of 3000km.

waypoints.name: Cape Reinga
waypoints.note: The northern terminus — the very tip of New Zealand. Where the Tasman Sea and Pacific Ocean meet.

waypoints.name: Ninety Mile Beach
waypoints.note: 90 miles of hard-sand beach. Tide timing critical. The TA's most monotonous and iconic section.

waypoints.name: Mount Ngauruhoe
waypoints.note: The perfect volcanic cone. Mount Doom from Lord of the Rings. Side trip off the main TA route.

waypoints.name: Red Crater
waypoints.note: Highest point on the Tongariro Alpine Crossing. Vivid red-ochre volcanic landscape.

waypoints.name: Whanganui River
waypoints.note: Sacred Māori river — the first river in the world granted legal personhood. Canoe section of the TA.

waypoints.name: Brewster Glacier
waypoints.note: One of the most accessible Southern Alps glaciers. Views down the Haast River valley.

waypoints.name: Bluff
waypoints.note: The southern terminus. The famous signpost with distances to everywhere. 3000km from Cape Reinga.
